ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the person involved in the incident */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the officer involved in the incident */,
  "reporting_officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the officer who reported the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "manner_of_death" TEXT /* Manner of death (e.g., shot, shot and Tasered) */,
  "armed" INTEGER /* Type of weapon the person was armed with (if any) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the person involved */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the person involved */,
  "race" INTEGER /* Race of the person involved */,
  "city" INTEGER /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "state" INTEGER /* State where the incident occurred */,
  "threat_level" INTEGER /* Threat level assessed during the incident */,
  "flee" TEXT /* Indicates whether the person was fleeing at the time of the incident */,
  "body_camera" INTEGER /* Indicates whether body camera footage is available for the incident */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident location */,
  "witness_count" INTEGER /* Number of witnesses present */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the incident */,
  "incident_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the incident (e.g., arrest, no arrest) */,
  "disciplinary_action_taken" INTEGER /* Indicates if any disciplinary action was taken against the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_race FOREIGN KEY ("race") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_threat_level FOREIGN KEY ("threat_level") REFERENCES threat_levels ("threat_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_reporting_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporting_officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_armed FOREIGN KEY ("armed") REFERENCES weapons ("weapon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "persons" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the person involved */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the person involved */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the person involved */,
  "previous_incidents" INTEGER /* Number of previous incidents involving the person */,
  "signs_of_mental_illness" INTEGER /* Indicates whether there were signs of mental illness present */,
  "mental_health_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes on mental health issues, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threat_levels" (
  "threat_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threat level */,
  "threat_level_description" TEXT /* Description of the threat level (e.g., attack, other) */,
  "threat_level_severity" TEXT /* Severity scale of the threat level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threat_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapons" (
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weapon */,
  "weapon_type" TEXT /* Description of the weapon type (e.g., gun, toy weapon, unarmed) */,
  "weapon_category" TEXT /* Category of the weapon (e.g., lethal, non-lethal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weapon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the officer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_description" TEXT /* Description of the gender (e.g., M, F) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_description" TEXT /* Description of the race (e.g., A, W, H) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_cameras" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident the camera footage is associated with */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the body camera footage is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_body_cameras_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
